response:
Yes we can check how long it took for udp packet to be sent to server like ping but only one direction

To do this we can use the System.Net.Sockets.UdpClient class

We can create a UdpClient instance and send a packet to the server

We can measure the time taken to send the packet using the DateTime.Now property

We can then compare the time taken to send the packet with the time taken to receive the response

This will give us the time taken for the packet to be sent to the server

We can also use the BitConverter class to convert the data to bytes and send it over the network

This will allow us to track the time taken for the packet to be sent to the server
